prompt: Edit image 1: Generate a depth-aware render using lighting. Apply a black and white filter referencing image 2, adjusting depth-based lighting. Enhance perceived depth and add dramatic shadows like image 3, separating the bird and branch from the background.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Rerender the scene of the canary on the branch into a depth-aware monochromatic image, adopting the black and white aesthetic of image 2. Employ depth-based lighting to create strong perceived depth and introduce dramatic, high-contrast shadows similar to those observed in image 3, ensuring the bird and the branch are sharply separated from the background cage.
